name: Innotech Corporation
summary: Innotech Corporation operates a financial news redistribution website. It also provides real time news alerts on US and Canadian stocks, mutual fund news and information alerts, insider trading, SEC filings, and IPO information. The company was formerly known as Equityalert.com, Inc. and changed its name to Innotech Corporation in July 2001. Innotech Corporation was incorporated in 1997 and is based in Las Vegas, Nevada.
